title: Family-Owned Spa, Halifax
copy: We thought accessibility compliance would be a burden. Dundee Media Group turned it into our biggest strength. Now our site feels welcoming to everyone — and our bookings have doubled.
name: Francis Anderson

title: Manufacturing Firm, Ontario
copy: They didn’t just give us a website. They gave us clarity. Every decision was backed by data, but delivered with creativity. We finally understand how digital can drive growth.
name: Aisha Patel

title: Nonprofit Organization, Toronto
copy: Our mission is about people, and Dundee Media Group captured that perfectly. The site feels alive, inclusive, and true to our values. Donors tell us they feel more connected than ever.
name: Marcus Chen

title: Tech Startup, Vancouver
copy: We needed speed and scalability. They delivered both — without sacrificing design. The site is sleek, accessible, and already helping us attract investors.
name: Jamal Robinson

title: Artisan Collective, Montreal
copy: For years, our craft felt invisible online. Dundee Media Group gave us a digital identity that feels authentic. Sales are up, but more importantly, our story is finally being told.
name: Head of Content & Community

title: Healthcare Practice, Alberta
copy: Our new site is clean, clear, and actually easy for our patients to use. The accessibility improvements made a real difference for people who need it most.
name: Dr. Susan Grant

title: Legal Services, Manitoba
copy: Dundee Media Group helped us make a complex offering feel simple. Our clients can now find the right information quickly, and our intake forms are converting better than ever.
name: Noah Wilson

title: Hospitality Brand, Nova Scotia
copy: They understood our need for storytelling and functionality. The new site is beautiful, faster, and more accessible — guests are already commenting on how easy it is to book.
name: Maya Thompson
